contradictions.reason: RFI-0124 answers unconditionally on chilled_water_supply_temperature; RFI-0287 reveals a caveat/condition on the same subject that the other never mentioned.

hours_saved_methodology: 1 contradiction(s) flagged x 6.0h avoided rework/coordination each, plus 0 duplicate RFI(s) matched instantly instead of manually researched x 2.5h each. Hours, not percentages, because the cost of a missed contradiction is engineer time spent re-litigating a decision, not a score.
